name: Alta Genetics do Brasil
services: AI stud, semen collection & processing; Gir Leiteiro, Girolando; international export
notes: One of the two largest AI companies in Brazil. Executed Brazil's largest-ever bovine-genetics export — ~40,000 dairy-Gir doses to India's NDDB (Jan 2024) — and exports across Latin America, Africa, and Asia.

name: ABS Pecplan / ABS Global (Genus)
services: AI stud, semen collection & processing, sexed semen, embryos; Gir Leiteiro, Girolando, Guzerá, Nelore
notes: PMGZ partner with 200+ bulls in collection; pioneer of sexed semen (Sexcel) in Brazil; global export network via ABS/Genus.

name: CRV (CRV Lagoa / CRV Tropical breeds)
services: AI/semen for tropical dairy breeds; explicit Gir & Girolando 'Tropical breeds' export line
notes: First Brazilian company to export zebu semen to Europe (2003); ~130,000 doses/yr to Ecuador, Colombia, Guatemala and others; international 'find a distributor' entry point.

name: In Vitro Brasil (IVB)
services: World-scale bovine IVF/embryo production (OPU-FIV), vitrification, long-distance embryo transport
notes: Large-scale Girolando and Gir embryo programs; supplied 350+ Girolando embryos exported to Kenya. Now part of the ABS/Genus group.

name: Semex do Brasil / Cenatte Embriões
services: AI company + embryo/IVF arm; Gir & Girolando semen and embryos
notes: Part of the global Semex export network; Cenatte developed a frozen sexed-female Girolando embryo technique (~95% female). Completed a first Gir Leiteiro semen export to India (Dec 2022).

name: Central Tairana (Grupo Semex)
notes: One of Brazil's largest collection centers; produced the Gir Leiteiro doses exported to India. (Direct site blocks automated fetch; reach via Grupo Semex.)

name: GENEAL — Genética e Biotecnologia Animal
notes: Exported 12,000+ embryos to 10+ countries and made a first Gir embryo shipment to India.

name: Estância Tamburil
services: Gir Leiteiro & Girolando embryo bank; semen
notes: Markets itself as the largest Gir Leiteiro & Girolando embryo bank in Latin America; genetics recognised in Brazil, Spain, and the USA.

name: Embrapa Gado de Leite
services: Government dairy research; PNMGL genomic evaluation, progeny testing, annual sire/cow summaries
notes: Not a commercial stud — runs the Gir and Girolando genetic-improvement programs with ABCGIL and the Girolando Association, and publishes the sumários that underpin the value of exported genetics.

name: ExpoZebu / EXPOGIL (Parque Fernando Costa)
services: Annual expo + official milk competition; record dairy-Gir sales and world milk records
notes: ABCZ's flagship event where dairy-Gir single-day and young-cow world records are set and the highest-value Gir cows change hands.
